text  
the engineer models the query response time for each database as a function of the number of queries Q it handles  
the MySQL function is TMySQL(Q) = a * Q² + b * e^{cQ}  
the Oracle function is TOracle(Q) = d * ln(Q+1) + e / (Q+1)  
the Sybase function is TSybase(Q) = f * Q^(3/2) - g * sqrt(Q)  
the total query response time function TTotal(Q) is the sum of the three functions  
the total query response time function is TTotal(Q) = TMySQL(Q) + TOracle(Q) + TSybase(Q)  
the engineer needs to balance the load distribution across these databases to minimize query response time
